title: Knowledge Demon

moves.title: Curse of Knowledge
effects: Player chooses a status card to add to hand
1st use: Disintegration (6 damage) or Mind Rot
3rd use: Disintegration (8 damage) or Waste Away

move_pattern: Cycles: Curse of Knowledge → Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder. After Curse of Knowledge is used 3 times, the cycle changes to Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder.
notes: Knowledge Demon has two behavioral states controlled by the IsBurnt flag. Knowledge Overwhelming sets IsBurnt = true while Ponder sets it to false, affecting which animations play (different idle, damage, and death animations for each state). Curse of Knowledge is a unique debuff move that forces the player to choose which status card to add to their hand; the available card options and Disintegration damage increase with each use (capped at 3 uses per combat). The demon also manages music parameters during certain moves to reflect its state changes.
